Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

Transaction: Non-binding proposal for Yulan to subscribe for Series C preferred shares of Haitang, anticipated to represent approximately 12% of post-money equity; price per share and valuation to be confirmed; indicative closing targeted for Q3 2026.

Financing: Internal resources plus potential A‑share non-public issuance; issuer is evaluating a non-public issuance plan that has not yet been publicly disclosed and may constitute inside information before any SSE/CSRC announcement.

Closing mechanics: Closing will occur after satisfaction of conditions and regulatory clearances; long‑stop date 31 December 2026; no break fee; no dividends on pref prior to conversion unless required by PRC law.
